## Summary

One or two sentences describing what changed and why.

- Key change 1
- Key change 2
- Key change 3 (if applicable)

## Task reference

Closes [TEAM-XXXX](link) or "No Linear issue" if not applicable.

## Test plan

What was tested and how (facts only, no intentions). Example: "Unit tests pass. Manually tested login flow on staging."

## Risk & rollback

Worst-case failure scenario and how to revert. Omit for meta/infra-only changes.

## Notes

Any additional context the team should know.
